## Summary

Describe the contributor-facing language-authority change and why it belongs in
the RhoeLanguage spec repo.

## Verification

- [ ] `bash ./scripts/verify-cutover.sh`
- [ ] Release-pack manifest regenerated if authority material changed
- [ ] Fixtures, schemas, grammars, or registries updated where behavior changed
- [ ] Compatibility notes updated where downstream behavior changed
- [ ] Documentation site validation passed when public docs changed

## Release Impact

- [ ] No normative behavior change
- [ ] Documentation updated where behavior changed
- [ ] No publishing, tagging, or visibility change included
- [ ] Downstream implementation impact is described
